name: UNITED STATES v. CALTEX (PHILIPPINES), INC. ET AL.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in UNITED STATES v. CALTEX (PHILIPPINES), INC. ET AL. (344 U.S. 149, 1952 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
